args.code: (() => { function setValue(selector, value) { const el = document.querySelector(selector); if (!el) return 'missing: ' + selector; el.focus(); el.value = value; el.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', {bubbles: true})); el.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', {bubbles: true})); el.blur(); return 'ok: ' + selector; } const results = []; const f = '#pediatrForm '; results.push(setValue(f + 'input[name=childName]', 'Проверка EmailJS')); results.push(setValue(f + 'input[name=childAge]', '5')); results.push(setValue(f + 'input[name=birthDate]', '2020-03-15')); results.push(setValue(f + 'input[name=birthWeight]', '3.5')); results.push(setValue(f + 'input[name=currentWeight]', '18')); results.push(setValue(f + 'input[name=height]', '110')); results.push(setValue(f + 'textarea[name=allergies]', 'Нет')); results.push(setValue(f + 'textarea[name=diseases]', 'Ветрянка')); results.push(setValue(f + 'textarea[name=currentComplaints]', 'Проверка работы email')); results.push(setValue(f + 'input[name=phone]', '+79001234567')); results.push(setValue(f + 'input[name=email]', 'test@example.com')); return results; })()
